full_text:
Wei Teng (Zhoulin) 魏滕 (周林)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Teng (魏滕), styledZhoulin (周林). A man of morality, he upset Sun Ce and Quan only to be saved by Lady Wu and Wu Fan. Wei Teng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
